# Euphorie

> AI Agent Command Center

Euphorie is an AI agent platform that provides a unified command center for interacting with multiple specialized AI agents. Each agent has distinct capabilities, personality, and domain expertise. Users interact through a clean, terminal-inspired interface designed for speed and precision.

## What Euphorie Does

Euphorie routes user requests to the most appropriate AI agent based on the task. Instead of a single general-purpose chatbot, Euphorie deploys specialized agents that excel in specific domains. Users can also direct commands to specific agents by name.

The platform is available on web, iOS, and Android with real-time streaming responses and a credit-based usage model.

## Agents

### ATLAS
Strategic planning and high-level decision support. ATLAS helps with business strategy, project planning, goal setting, and complex decision frameworks.

### CIPHER
Code generation, debugging, technical architecture, and engineering analysis. CIPHER handles programming tasks across languages, reviews code, explains technical concepts, and assists with system design.

### ORACLE
Research, data synthesis, and deep knowledge retrieval. ORACLE excels at gathering information, analyzing data patterns, summarizing complex topics, and providing well-sourced answers.

### HERALD
Communications, copywriting, content creation, and messaging. HERALD crafts emails, marketing copy, social media content, presentations, and any form of written communication.

### SENTINEL
Security monitoring, threat assessment, compliance checking, and system oversight. SENTINEL reviews security postures, identifies vulnerabilities, and provides guidance on digital safety best practices.

## Technical Details

- Backend: Django (Python) on AWS EC2
- AI Models: Gemini 2.0 Flash, Claude Sonnet
- Authentication: Email/password, Google, Apple (iOS), Microsoft
- Payments: Stripe credit-based system
- Mobile: Flutter (iOS and Android)

## Company

Euphorie is a product of Crene, Inc., founded by Stephen Lee.
